hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside a Bollinger Band with an extreme RSI(7) reading during active London/NY sessions and sufficient volatility (BB width above 40th percentile), price mean-reverts toward the middle band within 30 bars. This is a fade, not a breakout.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi7 < 12 AND bb_width_pctile > 40 AND session_mask == 1
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi7 > 88 AND bb_width_pctile > 40 AND session_mask == 1

regime_filter.rationale: Avoid strong trend (fade would get run over) and dead-range tape.

notes: Replaces dead Donchian-breakout branch. Inspired by port_allowed mean-reversion-scalper-mql5 card. Fade logic, not trend.
